scenarios.description: Seeding historical metrics populates the metrics endpoint
Churn computation returns correct rate from subscription data
scenarios.acceptance: GET /churn returns a churn_rate consistent with churned vs total subscriptions

scenarios.description: Revenue endpoint returns entries sorted by date with correct totals
scenarios.acceptance: GET /revenue with date range returns matching entries and total_amount

scenarios.description: Dashboard summary aggregates MRR, ARR, churn, and runway correctly
scenarios.acceptance: GET /metrics/summary returns non-null values for mrr, arr, churn_rate, runway_months
